name: Dino & Chill
short_description: Hatch and collect adorable dinosaurs that roam your screen while you work or play! Watch them gather gems, unlock perks, and customize your setup. Move and resize them freely, even across multiple monitors. But be careful—these dinos can get messy, so don’t forget to clean up after them!
detailed_description:
🦕 Dino & Chill 🦖
Relax. Hatch dinos. Embrace the chaos.

Welcome to Dino & Chill – the ultimate laid-back dinosaur sim where cozy vibes meet prehistoric fun. Collect and name adorable dinos, build up your sanctuary, and watch as your scaly companions roam, poop, and live their best Jurassic lives.

Whether you're managing your growing herd, opening surprise daily chests, or just vibing with your favorite dinos, there's always something delightful happening in the park.

Key Features:

🌿 Chill Gameplay – No pressure. No timers. Just you, your dinos, and the sweet sounds of prehistoric peace.

🦖 Collect Them All – Discover a growing list of cute, quirky dinosaurs – from classics to rare retirees.

💩 Dino Poo Happens – Yes, your dinos poop. Yes, it's important. Yes, we balanced it.

🎁 Daily Surprises – Log in daily for a shot at gems, perks, and free goodies (or maybe nothing at all 👀).

🎨 Name & Nurture – Give your dinos custom names and build a park that reflects your vibe.

Whether you're here to collect, customize, or just chill with dinos, this is your happy place.
